lessons.title: Numeric and Integer Types
lessons.description: Learn about numeric (double) and integer data types in R.

lessons.title: Character and Logical Types
lessons.description: Explore character strings and logical (boolean) values.

lessons.title: Type Checking and Conversion
lessons.description: Check the type of an object and convert between types.

lessons.title: Working with NA and NULL
lessons.description: Understand missing values (NA) and empty objects (NULL).

lessons.title: Basic String Operations
lessons.description: Manipulate character strings with paste, nchar, substr, etc.
